author: draganrakita
content:
Alternatively we could check depth and caller balance before even loading the CALL target (and eip7702 delegate) and before consuming gas?

This will be most performant solution, and even better as we can optimize child account from BAL.

Pseudo code:

charge(100gas) // static gas for CALL
check depth; // if false push 0 to stack, continue exec.
check caller balance; // if false push 0 to stack, continue exec.
load target account; // if cold, charge cold gas and add it to BAL 
if delegated account // charge warm gas
   load delegate account; // if cold, charge cold gas, warm it and add it to BAL.

Previous fork path still needs support, but this is more optimal path for BAL. Additionally removes wasting of gas if depth or balance checks are false.
